description: Initial execution result for task task1

data.task_objective: Design the RESTful API specification (endpoints, request/response models) for core operations: ingesting jobs/resumes, orchestrating interviews, submitting responses, scoring, emailing, and retrieving reports.
data.context: No completed previous tasks context available.
data.next_objective:
Task task2:
  Objective: Implement the Resume–Job Matching Module: parse and embed job descriptions and resumes, compute semantic similarity scores, and expose matching interface.
Task task3:
  Objective: Build the Interview Orchestration Engine: manage dynamic question flows, call AI services to generate technical and behavioral questions (including follow-ups), and track session state.
Task task4:
  Objective: Develop the Candidate Evaluation & Scoring Logic: analyze candidate responses for relevance, depth, confidence, and technical accuracy; compute composite scores across defined categories.
Task task5:
  Objective: Create the Email Generation Module: define templates and AI prompt flows for automated interview invitations and follow-up communications.
Task task6:
  Objective: Implement the Final Report Generation Module: assemble resume-job match data, interview summaries, technical and behavioral assessments, strengths/weaknesses, and recommendations into a structured report.
data.result:
```yaml
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: AI-Driven Interview and Candidate Evaluation System API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: RESTful API for managing jobs, resumes, interviews, evaluations, and reports.

paths:
  /jobs:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new job description
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Title of the job
                job_description:
                  type: string
                  description: Detailed description of the job
                department:
                  type: string
                  description: Department for the job
                location:
                  type: string
                  description: Job location
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of required skills
              example:
                job_title: Software Engineer
                job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                department: Engineering
                location: New York, NY
                skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Job created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                example:
                  job_id: job123
        '400':
          description: Invalid request

    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all jobs
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of jobs retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    job_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the job
                    job_title:
                      type: string
                      description: Title of the job
                    job_description:
                      type: string
                      description: Detailed description of the job
                    department:
                      type: string
                      description: Department for the job
                    location:
                      type: string
                      description: Job location
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of required skills
                  example:
                    job_id: job123
                    job_title: Software Engineer
                    job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                    department: Engineering
                    location: New York, NY
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]

  /jobs/{job_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific job by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: job_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the job
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Job retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                  job_title:
                    type: string
                    description: Title of the job
                  job_description:
                    type: string
                    description: Detailed description of the job
                  department:
                    type: string
                    description: Department for the job
                  location:
                    type: string
                    description: Job location
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of required skills
                example:
                  job_id: job123
                  job_title: Software Engineer
                  job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                  department: Engineering
                  location: New York, NY
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
        '404':
          description: Job not found

  /resumes:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new candidate resume
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the candidate
                resume_text:
                  type: string
                  description: Text content of the resume
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of skills extracted from the resume
              example:
                candidate_name: John Doe
                resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                email: john.doe@example.com
                skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Resume created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all resumes
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of resumes retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    resume_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the resume
                    candidate_name:
                      type: string
                      description: Name of the candidate
                    resume_text:
                      type: string
                      description: Text content of the resume
                    email:
                      type: string
                      format: email
                      description: Candidate's email address
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                  example:
                    resume_id: resume456
                    candidate_name: John Doe
                    resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                    email: john.doe@example.com
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]

  /resumes/{resume_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific resume by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: resume_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the resume
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Resume retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                  candidate_name:
                    type: string
                    description: Name of the candidate
                  resume_text:
                    type: string
                    description: Text content of the resume
                  email:
                    type: string
                    format: email
                    description: Candidate's email address
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
                  candidate_name: John Doe
                  resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                  email: john.doe@example.com
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
        '404':
          description: Resume not found

  /interviews:
    post:
      summary: Start a new interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the job for the interview
                resume_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the candidate's resume
              example:
                job_id: job123
                resume_id: resume456
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Interview session started successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  interview_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the interview session
                  first_question:
                    type: string
                    description: The first question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  interview_id: interview789
                  first_question: "Tell me about your experience with Python."
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Job or Resume not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/questions:
    get:
      summary: Get the current or next question in the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Question retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  question:
                    type: string
                    description: The question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/responses:
    post:
      summary: Submit a candidate's response to a question
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                question:
                  type: string
                  description: The question being answered.
                response:
                  type: string
                  description: The candidate's answer to the question
              example:
                question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
                response: "'==' compares values, while '===' compares values and types."
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Response submitted successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  next_question:
                    type: string
                    nullable: true
                    description: The next question to ask, or null if the interview is complete
                  evaluation:
                    type: object
                    description: Evaluation of the response
                    properties:
                      relevance:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Relevance score (0-1)
                      depth:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Depth score (0-1)
                      confidence:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Confidence score (0-1)
                      technical_accuracy:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Technical accuracy score (0-1)
                    example:
                      relevance: 0.9
                      depth: 0.8
                      confidence: 0.7
                      technical_accuracy: 0.95
                example:
                  next_question: "How would you optimize a slow SQL query?"
                  evaluation:
                    relevance: 0.9
                    depth: 0.8
                    confidence: 0.7
                    technical_accuracy: 0.95
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/scores:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the candidate's scores for the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Scores retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  technical_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall technical score
                  behavioral_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall behavioral score
                  overall_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall score
                  category_scores:
                    type: object
                    description: Scores for individual categories
                    properties:
                      problem_solving:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Problem-solving score
                      communication:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Communication score
                    example:
                      problem_solving: 0.85
                      communication: 0.9
                example:
                  technical_score: 0.8
                  behavioral_score: 0.9
                  overall_score: 0.85
                  category_scores:
                    problem_solving: 0.85
                    communication: 0.9
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /emails/invite:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send an interview invitation email
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Job title
                interview_date:
                  type: string
                  format: date-time
                  description: Date and time of the interview
                interviewer_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the interviewer
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                job_title: Software Engineer
                interview_date: "2024-01-20T10:00:00Z"
                interviewer_name: Jane Smith
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Interview invitation email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /emails/followup:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send a follow-up email to the candidate
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                interview_id:
                  type: string
                  description: Interview ID
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                interview_id: interview789
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Follow-up email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /reports/{interview_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the final candidate evaluation report
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Report retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_job_match_analysis:
                    type: string
                    description: Analysis of how well the resume matches the job description
                  interview_summary:
                    type: string
                    description: Summary of the interview
                  technical_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's technical skills
                  behavioral_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's behavioral traits
                  strengths:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's strengths
                  weaknesses:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's weaknesses
                  final_recommendation:
                    type: string
                    description: Final recommendation (Hire/No Hire/Maybe)
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    type: object
                    description: Detailed breakdown of the candidate's scores
                    properties:
                      technical_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall technical score
                      behavioral_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall behavioral score
                      overall_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall score
                    example:
                      technical_score: 0.8
                      behavioral_score: 0.9
                      overall_score: 0.85
                example:
                  resume_job_match_analysis: "The candidate's resume closely matches the job description, with strong skills in Python and Javascript."
                  interview_summary: "The candidate performed well in the interview, demonstrating strong technical knowledge and communication skills."
                  technical_assessment: "The candidate has a solid understanding of software engineering principles and is proficient in Python and Javascript."
                  behavioral_assessment: "The candidate is a good communicator and works well in a team environment."
                  strengths: ["Technical Skills", "Communication", "Problem Solving"]
                  weaknesses: ["Lack of experience with AWS"]
                  final_recommendation: "Hire"
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    technical_score: 0.8
                    behavioral_score: 0.9
                    overall_score: 0.85
        '404':
          description: Report not found
components:
  schemas:
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        message:
          type: string
          description: Error message
      example:
        message: "An error occurred"
```
